creator: n.diablo.n.f@list.ru
text:
After the next update of qt-core to version 5.15.2, the plasma shell crashes when trying to load holidaysevents.so. Only disabling all calendars helps to boot up the system. But this time, the clock in the tray works fine and when you click on it, the calendar is displayed.

% pkg info qt5-core
qt5-core-5.15.2

% plasmashell 
kf.plasma.quick: Applet preload policy set to 1
qml: onLoaded
qml: bindSignals ICalManager_QMLTYPE_237(0x816326bc0)
qml: bindSignals DebugCalendarManager_QMLTYPE_233(0x816327280)
qml: bindSignals GoogleCalendarManager_QMLTYPE_234(0x816327640)
qml: bindSignals PlasmaCalendarManager_QMLTYPE_235(0x816327b80)
Could not create Plasma Calendar Plugin:  "/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/qt5/plugins/plasmacalendarplugins/holidaysevents.so"
"The shared library was not found."
Loading Calendar plugin AstronomicalEventsPlugin(0x81075ba60)
Loading Calendar plugin HolidaysEventsPlugin(0x816388bc0)
qml: bindSignals ICalManager_QMLTYPE_237(0x81632a780)
qml: bindSignals DebugCalendarManager_QMLTYPE_233(0x81632bec0)
qml: bindSignals GoogleCalendarManager_QMLTYPE_234(0x8163250c0)
qml: bindSignals PlasmaCalendarManager_QMLTYPE_235(0x816325900)
Could not create Plasma Calendar Plugin:  "/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/qt5/plugins/plasmacalendarplugins/holidaysevents.so"
"The shared library was not found."
21
Cyclic dependency detected between "file:///usr/local/lib/qt5/qml/org/kde/kirigami.2/styles/org.kde.desktop.plasma/Units.qml" and "file:///usr/local/lib/qt5/qml/org/kde/kirigami.2/styles/org.kde.desktop.plasma/Units.qml"
Неверная инструкция(core dumped)
